Permits Every Pembroke Pines Business Needs

  • ✓
    EIN (Employer Identification Number)

    Free from IRS — required for bank accounts and hiring

  • ✓
    Florida Business Registration

    File with Secretary of State — LLC, Corp, or Partnership

  • ✓
    Florida Sales Tax Permit

    Free from FL Dept of Revenue — required if selling taxable goods

  • ✓
    Pembroke Pines Local Business Tax Receipt

    Required by most Pembroke Pines businesses — apply through city/county

  • ✓
    Zoning Approval / Certificate of Use

    Verify your business location is zoned for your activity

FAQ: Pembroke Pines Business Permits

How many permits does a typical Pembroke Pines business need?

Most businesses in Pembroke Pines, Florida need between 8 and 15 permits across federal, state, and local levels. The exact number depends on your business type, whether you have employees, and your specific industry.

How much do business permits cost in Pembroke Pines?

Total permit costs typically range from $200-$2,000 for a small business. Some permits are free (like EIN), while others like liquor licenses can cost $1,000+. Our report breaks down costs for each permit you need.

What happens if I operate without the required permits?

Operating without required permits can result in fines, forced closure, and legal liability. In Florida, penalties vary by permit type but can range from $100 to $10,000+.

Don't risk missing a required permit
